name: Product-Manager-Skills
description: 42 battle-tested PM frameworks for AI agents covering PRDs, prioritization, discovery, and stakeholder facilitation. Works with Claude Code, Cowork, Codex, ChatGPT, and Gemini. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 licensed.
scan_summary: Large collection of 42 PM framework skills with Shell adapter scripts. License is CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (non-commercial) which is noted. Shell scripts in /scripts are adapter helpers for packaging, not executed at runtime. Well-organized SKILL.md structure per skill. No network calls, no credential handling, no dangerous bash patterns found.
